goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'finches bed and breakfast'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking' and 'hotel type'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'attraction' by '09:15'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
